mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_recommendations (user_id, isbn, title, author, publisher, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.id AS u_id, u.user_account AS u_account, u.user_name AS u_name, u.email AS u_email, a.id AS a_id, a.user_account AS a_account, a.user_name AS a_name FROM book_recommendations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, u.id AS u_id, u.user_account AS u_account, u.user_name AS u_name, a.id AS a_id, a.user_account AS a_account, a.user_name AS a_name FROM book_recommendations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users a ON r.admin_id = a.id ORDER BY CASE r.status WHEN 'Pending' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.id AS u_id, u.user_account AS u_account, u.user_name AS u_name, a.id AS a_id, a.user_account AS a_account, a.user_name AS a_name FROM book_recommendations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM book_recommendations GROUP BY status
